# Government Opportunity Radar

Searchable daily shortlist of U.S. government grants and contracts for software, AI, data, cybersecurity, automation, and cloud teams.

Audience: grant writers, business development teams, proposal teams, software companies, AI labs, cybersecurity teams, data teams, cloud teams, and research groups that need a faster shortlist of public-sector opportunities.

Homepage use: start with the priority picks. Each pick explains fit, deadline, topic match, and whether a funding amount is listed before the full opportunity list.

## Canonical resources

- Site: https://awkwardsky.github.io/five-dollars/
- Support status: https://awkwardsky.github.io/five-dollars/payment.html
- JSON data: https://awkwardsky.github.io/five-dollars/opportunities.json
- RSS feed: https://awkwardsky.github.io/five-dollars/feed.xml

- Current status: not received
- Last checked: 2026-06-25T04:36:18.870Z

## Topics

- Software: 14 current matches
- Artificial Intelligence: 20 current matches
- Automation: 2 current matches
- Cybersecurity: 14 current matches
- Data Science: 15 current matches
- Cloud: 5 current matches

## Current top opportunities

1. Pathways to Enable Secure Open-Source Ecosystems - U.S. National Science Foundation - deadline 09/01/2026
2. U.S.-D.R. Technology and Science Fair - U.S. Mission to the Dominican Republic - deadline 07/10/2026
3. Tech Innovation Lab - U.S. Mission to Morocco - deadline 07/13/2026
4. Prosperity Stack Fellowship - U.S. Mission to South Korea - deadline 07/13/2026
5. The 2027 YSEALI Regional Workshop: Securing Supply Chains - U.S. Mission to Indonesia - deadline 08/31/2026
6. Condensed Matter and Materials Theory - U.S. National Science Foundation - deadline Proposals accepted anytime
7. Energy, Power, Control, and Networks - U.S. National Science Foundation - deadline Proposals accepted anytime
8. Cybersecurity Innovation for Cyberinfrastructure - U.S. National Science Foundation - deadline 01/20/2027
9. UNITED STATES MILITARY ACADEMY Broad Agency Announcement - Dept of the Army -- Materiel Command - deadline 03/31/2027
10. Cooperative Agreement for Affiliated Partner with the Gulf Coast Cooperative Ecosystem Studies Unit (CESU) - Geological Survey - deadline 05/30/2026
11. Secure Innovation: Advancing Artificial Intelligence, Cybersecurity, and Digital Resilience in Argentina - U.S. Mission to Argentina - deadline 05/31/2026
12. Public Diplomacy Section Praia: Small Grants Program - U.S. Mission to Cape Verde - deadline 06/19/2026

## Operating rules

No fake traffic, ad-click automation, spam, private keys, seed phrases, login-wall scraping, or revenue guarantees.
